rationale: Title Y is slightly stronger overall because naming the LAmbre device adds clinically relevant specificity and improves searchability for a feasibility study. Its added length and repeated phrasing make it a bit less elegant than X, but the device detail is material enough to outweigh that cost.
loser_weakness: Title X is cleaner and more journal-like, but it omits the device, which makes the intervention less precise and less informative for readers.
